# Release Notes

<!-- Generated by tools/build_plugins.py -->

## 0.1.0 - 2026-04-22

- Generated Codex, Claude Code, and OpenCode plugin packages from the canonical shared skills tree.
- Published local marketplace metadata for Codex and Claude Code, plus git-install metadata for OpenCode.
- Kept `skills/` and `docs/skills/` as the only editable source of truth for shared coaching behavior.
